instruction: Apply OWASP Top 10 principles to audit and harden web applications. Use to identify and fix injection vulnerabilities, XSS, insecure deserialization, broken access control, and security misconfigurations. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Audit and remediate OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities in web applications systematically.  ## Rules of Input Validation

workflow.action: Run OWASP Top 10 checklist scan against application entry points.
Audit all user inputs for validation, sanitization, and parameterized queries.
Review access control — ensure authorization checks on every protected route/action.
Inspect HTTP headers — CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy.
Review dependency tree for known CVEs using audit tools.
Document findings by severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low) with remediation steps.

outputContract: OWASP Top 10 audit report with findings per category.
Input validation inventory per form/API endpoint.
Dependency CVE report with remediation priority.
